message:
撰写 Related Work section。

★ 字数要求：1000词
★ 写入路径：/home/liaowenjie/.openclaw-multi/shared/paper-project-4/drafts/v1/section_related_work.tex

Outline：
### 2. Related Work (~1000 words)
#### 2.1 Zero-Shot Learning for Fault Diagnosis
- Classical ZSL frameworks (DAP, ESZSL, SAE)
- Attribute-based fault diagnosis approaches
- Limitations: binary attributes, domain shift

#### 2.2 Diffusion Models for Fault Diagnosis
- DDPM fundamentals and recent industrial applications
- Conditional diffusion for data augmentation
- DP-CDDPM-AC and related works
- Gap: no semantic-aware diffusion for zero-shot scenarios

#### 2.3 CLIP in Industrial Applications
- CLIP architecture and vision-language alignment
- Recent CLIP applications in industrial inspection/diagnosis
- Gap: CLIP semantic embeddings unexplored in zero-shot fault generation
